zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Barclay 7th of Kilbirnie於1433年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼時，他的父親David Berkeley23歲，母親Janet De Keith15歲。他於大約1449年與Margaret Humphrey在蘇格蘭班福爾波迪利尼結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他去世於1470年在他的家鄉享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Barclay 7th of Kilbirnie于1433年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼时，他的父亲David Berkeley23岁，母亲Janet De Keith15岁。他于大约1449年与Margaret Humphrey在苏格兰班福爾波迪利尼结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他去世于1470年在他的家乡享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barclay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Barkley
meanings: English and northern Irish (Antrim): variant of   Barclay  .
Americanized form of German   Berkel   or of some other similar (like-sounding) German surname.

variants.name: Barclift
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of Scottish   Barclay  .

variants.name: Berkeley
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Brickley
meanings: English and Irish: metathesized form of   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Barclay 7th of Kilbirnie was born in 1433, in Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, David Berkeley, was 23 and his mother, Janet De Keith, was 15. He married Margaret Humphrey about 1449, in Botriphnie, Banffshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He died in 1470, in his hometown, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Barclay 7th of Kilbirnie est né en 1433, à Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, David Berkeley, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Janet De Keith, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Humphrey environ 1449, à Botriphnie, Banffshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1470, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Barclay 7th of Kilbirnie 1433 in Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater David Berkeley 23 und seine Mutter Janet De Keith 15. Er hat um 1449 in Botriphnie, Banffshire, Scotland Margaret Humphrey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb 1470 im Alter von 37 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Barclay 7th of Kilbirnie è nato il nel 1433 nel Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, David Berkeley, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Janet De Keith, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Humphrey circa 1449, nel Botriphnie, Banffshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì nel 1470, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Barclay 7th of Kilbirnieが1433年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアキルバーニーで生まれた時，父David Berkeleyは23歳，母Janet De Keithは15歳であった。約1449年にスコットランドバンフシュアイアボトリフニーでMargaret Humphreyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1470年に故郷で37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Barclay 7th of Kilbirnie(이)가 1433년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 킬비른이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 David Berkeley(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet De Keith(은)는 15세였다. 그는 대략 1449년 스컷랜드 반프실르 벗리프니에서 Margaret Humphrey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1470년 그의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Barclay 7th of Kilbirnie nasceu em 1433, em Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, David Berkeley, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Janet De Keith, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Humphrey aproximadamente 1449, em Botriphnie, Banffshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1470, em sua cidade natal, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Barclay 7th of Kilbirnie родился в 1433 г. в местности килбирни, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени David Berkeley было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Janet De Keith, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Humphrey около 1449 г. в местности ботрифни, банффшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он умер в 1470 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 37 лет.
